room.caption: [NightmareG1] Slit here: This is probably my favourite Nightmare Gate up to now. Gotta inhale this atmosphere.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(107) global.mapTeleport=7
abilSetRemove(1) for(i=0;i<4;i+=1) { global.hasShoes[i]=2 } global.hasAbilToken[5]=3 global.hasAbilToken[6]=3 global.activeAbility[0]=3 global.activeAbility[1]=3 global.canDoubleJump=2 global.canCharSwap=2
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backG6ForgottenIsles backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6; backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999 backFollow.image_xscale=2; backFollow.image_yscale=2 backDraw=instance_create(0,0,oG6_CastleBack) backDraw.yStartDraw=207
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(905) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=208 newMapY=272 toRoom=rMain_56Gate newDraw=1 image_blend=c_black
stringToShow="-Dev Note: Maybe we're being too cliche with this final level." signSize=2

bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=16 newMapY=224 toRoom=rExtGateG_5 newDraw=1 image_blend=c_maroon
var instrProg; instrProg=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,7) if instrProg!="7" and instrProg!="9" {instance_destroy()}
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=7 image_yscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=3 shiftChange=72 spriteChange=16
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=7 image_yscale=2 xDir=3 yDir=2 shiftChange=48 spriteChange=16
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=7 image_yscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=3 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=16
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=7 image_yscale=2 xDir=3 yDir=1 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=16
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=7 image_yscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=-3 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=16
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=7 image_yscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=3 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=16
enemySpawn=oPT_Slime type=0 xSpawn=x+16 ySpawn=y-192 activate=1 lvlMin=50 lvlMax=50 if global.stJGame_C[1]>50 { lvlMax=global.stJGame_C[1] if lvlMax>60 {lvlMax=60} }
